name: planewave
description: Install PlaneWave Instruments telescope control software (PWI4) and PS3 CLI tools.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${pwi4Path}='C:\Program Files\PlaneWave Instruments\PWI4\pwi4.exe'; ${ps3cliPath}='C:\Users\mast\Documents\PlaneWave\ps3cli'; ${log}=Join-Path ${env:ProgramData} 'MAST\logs\planewave-verify.log'; if ((Test-Path ${pwi4Path}) -and (Test-Path ${ps3cliPath})) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value 'PlaneWave installed successfully'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path ${env:ProgramData} 'MAST\logs\planewave-smoke.txt') -Value 'planewave_ok' } else { 'PlaneWave components not found' | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8 }"
